faqs.answer:
📋 *Booking & Deposit*

A 50% deposit is required to secure your session date. The balance is due on the day of the shoot.

Deposits are non-refundable but can be transferred to a rescheduled date with at least 48 hours notice.

⏱️ *Turnaround Time*

Portraits & Product: 5–7 business days
Fashion & Lifestyle: 7 business days
Events: 7–10 business days
Content/Video: 7 business days

Rush delivery (within 48–72 hours) is available for an additional fee.

📍 *Myke Studio Location*

Evergreen Mall, Durumi, Abuja

📞 0812 603 8443
📸 @myke_studios on Instagram

Sessions are by appointment. Walk-ins are subject to availability.

🕐 *Studio Hours*

Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Sunday: Closed (special appointments only)

To book a session outside regular hours, contact us directly.

🌳 *Outdoor / On-Location Shoots*

Yes! We do outdoor and on-location shoots across Abuja.

Outdoor sessions are available for portrait, fashion, lifestyle, and event photography. Location fees may apply depending on distance.

Tap *Book a Session* to get started!

✅ *Bringing Your Own Photographer*

Absolutely — you can bring your own photographer or creative team for studio rentals.

Studio rental starts from ₦25,000/hour and includes full access to our lighting rigs, props, and sets.

📸 *View Myke's Portfolio*

Check out our work on Instagram:
👉 @mykevisuals — https://instagram.com/mykevisuals
👉 @myke_studios — https://instagram.com/myke_studios

With 70K+ followers and 500+ posts, there's plenty to explore! 🎨

👗 *What to Wear*

We recommend:
• 2–3 outfit changes for variety
• Solid colours or minimal patterns work best on camera
• Avoid logos unless it's a brand shoot
• Bring accessories to switch up your look

Not sure? Our team can advise you before your session!

🎨 *Editing & Retouching*

All delivered images are professionally colour-graded and retouched.

We don't deliver raw/unedited files. Additional retouching beyond standard is available on request at an extra cost.

Want a specific editing style? Share a reference and we'll match it.

💳 *Payment*

We accept:
• Bank transfer
• Opay / Palmpay
• Cash (in studio)

Payment details will be shared after your booking is confirmed. A 50% deposit secures your date.
